sections.paragraph: pl. אִמְּרִין m. Ch. a lamb, Ezr 6:9, 17 Ezr 6:17 7:17 . Syr. ܐܡܶܪܐܳ. Arab. إِمَّرُ, إِمَّرَةُ a lamb. Root أَمَرَ Conj. I, IV. to make much; أَمرَ to become much; hence, prop. progeny of the flock. It might also be, progeny of the flock, so called from the idea of producing, see under the root אָמַר No. 1 .
